case_title: SOPHANARY ROS VS. SMITH ADRON KETCHUM DR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE: $35.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROS, SOPHANARY AS TO DEFENDANT KETCHUM DR, SMITH ADRON
